phrases.intent_en: Ask how much a ticket costs
phrases.cultural_note: The Panthéon is a national monument. Free for EU residents under 26.

responses.english: It is eleven euros for adults. Free for EU residents under 26.
responses.phonetic: seh onz uh-ROH poor layz ah-DOOLT. grah-TWEET poor lay mwahn duh vant-see ahn duh loo-AY
responses.french: C'est onze euros pour les adultes. Gratuit pour les moins de 26 ans de l'UE.

phrases.cultural_note: The main entrance is on Place du Panthéon, facing the Luxembourg Gardens.

responses.english: The main entrance is in front, on the square.
responses.phonetic: lan-TRAY pran-see-PAL eh tahn fass, soor lah plass
responses.french: L'entrée principale est en face, sur la place.

phrases.intent_en: Ask about access to the dome
phrases.text_local: Peut-on visiter la colonnade en haut ?
phrases.pronunciation: puh-TOHN vee-zee-TAY lah koh-loh-NAD ahn OH
phrases.cultural_note: The colonnade gallery at the top is open seasonally (April to October). It offers a stunning view of the Latin Quarter and all of Paris.

responses.english: Dome access is by the staircase, on the right.
responses.phonetic: lahk-SEH oh dohm eh par les-kah-lee-YAY, soor lah drwaht
responses.french: L'accès au dôme est par l'escalier, sur la droite.

phrases.cultural_note: The crypt is included in the admission ticket. The tombs are simple and dignified. Marie Curie's tomb is lined with lead due to her radioactive research.

responses.english: The crypt is downstairs. The entrance is at the back of the nave.
responses.phonetic: lah kreeept eh tahn bah. lan-TRAY eh toh fohn duh lah nef
responses.french: La crypte est en bas. L'entrée est au fond de la nef.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if there are guided tours in English
phrases.text_local: Il y a des visites guidées en anglais ?
phrases.pronunciation: eel ee ah day vee-ZEET gee-DAY ahn ahn-GLEH
phrases.cultural_note: Audio guides in English are typically available. Guided tours may run on certain days only.

responses.english: There is an audio guide in English at the ticket counter.
responses.phonetic: eel ee ah uhn oh-dee-oh-GEED ahn ahn-GLEH oh gee-SHAY
responses.french: Il y a un audioguide en anglais au guichet.
